))

2.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Imagine you are powering the intelligent assistant for an emergency response command center. Given the following natural-language text, analyze it carefully and classify the intent by selecting the single most accurate category from the following list: alarm_query, alarm_set, calendar_query, calendar_remove, calendar_set, cooking_recipe, datetime_query, email_query, email_sendemail, general_quirky, iot_hue_lightoff, lists_createoradd, lists_query, lists_remove, music_query, news_query, play_audiobook, play_music, play_podcasts, play_radio, qa_currency, qa_definition, qa_factoid, qa_stock, recommendation_events, recommendation_locations, social_post, takeaway_order, transport_query, weather_query. Output only the category name—no explanation, no extra text. Choose carefully: a single misclassification could trigger the wrong system in a high-stakes environment.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
